## StreamPreferenceChangedEvent type

Fired when [Player.setStreamPreference()](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.player.setstreampreference) changed the active stream preference.

**Signature:**

```typescript
declare type StreamPreferenceChangedEvent = {
    preference: StreamPreference;
};
```
**References:** [StreamPreference](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.streampreference)
